title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while out with Tamamo Cross...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hey, look! Those plushies are Cuties, right?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross points toward a claw machine
filled with Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. The pipsqueaks back home said somethin'
about 'em bein' all the rage at school.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But... how many tries is it gonna take to nab one?
If I get it first try, that's only a hundred yen.
choice_data_list: But if I end up gettin' hooked...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: It could set me back upwards of 200—no, 1,000 yen! That'd be a tragedy...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Wait, why am I jinxin' it?! I gotta go in expectin'
to win one!
choice_data_list: Look no further, for I have just what you need.
Look no further, for I have just what you need.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya do? You're makin' it sound like ya got
somethin' special lined up. C'mon, spill.
choice_data_list: I'm going to take on the crane game for you!
I'm going to take on the crane game for you!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What?! Seriously?! You're willin' to shell out
hard-earned coins for me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Tamamo Cross still flustered, I insert a coin
into the machine.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
T-Trainer, you're really somethin', ya know that?
Guh... Okay, I'm cheerin' for ya!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
